Name: NpcThinkParam
Description: Determines the parameters for enemy AI.

Fields.Name: Logic Script ID
Fields.Description: The logic script to use for this character.

Fields.Name: Battle Goal ID
Fields.Description: The battle script to use for this character.

Fields.Name: Battle Distance: Short
Fields.Description: The distance between this character and the target that is treated as 'short' for combat distance calculations.

Fields.Name: Battle Distance: Medium
Fields.Description: The distance between this character and the target that is treated as 'medium' for combat distance calculations.

Fields.Name: Battle Distance: Long
Fields.Description: The distance between this character and the target that is treated as 'long' for combat distance calculations.

Fields.Name: Battle Distance: End
Fields.Description: The distance between this character and the target that ends combat aggression. A character outside of this range will no longer attempt combat actions.

Fields.Name: Goal Duration on Wall Collision
Fields.Description: The duration of the BackToHome goal when this character hits an enemy wall collision (which blocks movement). In seconds.

Fields.Name: Caution State: Goal ID
Fields.Description: The goal ID to use when this character enters the 'Caution' alert state.

Fields.Name: Action ID on Blocked Movement
Fields.Description: The EzState ID to use for the action to perform when this character's movement is stopped by a destructible object.

Fields.Name: Search State: Goal ID
Fields.Description: The goal ID to use when this character enters the 'Search' alert state.

Fields.Name: Call for Help: Animation ID (Respond)
Fields.Description: The action animation ID (EzStateAnimID) to use when responding to a call for help.

Fields.Name: Call for Help: Animation ID (Call)
Fields.Description: The action animation ID (EzStateAnimID) to use when calling for help.

Fields.Name: Visual Search Distance
Fields.Description: The maximum extent to check for when searching visually (sight) for this character. In metres.

Fields.Name: Auditory Search Distance
Fields.Description: The maximum extent to check for when searching aurally (sound) for this character. In metres.

Fields.Name: Auditory Dampening Distance
Fields.Description: The distance at which the size of a sound source will be reduced. Sounds below this distance will no longer be heard. In metres.

Fields.Name: Olfactory Search Distance
Fields.Description: The maximum extent to check for when searching olfactorily (smell) for this character. This method of searching is never blocked by any obstacle. In metres.

Fields.Name: Battle Act: Return Home Distance
Fields.Description:
The distance after which this character will always return home. In metres.
A parameter for the COMMON_SetBattleActLogic script.

Fields.Name: Battle Act: Return Home Distance (Combat)
Fields.Description:
The distance after which this character will return home if in combat with a target. In metres.
A parameter for the COMMON_SetBattleActLogic script.

Fields.Name: Battle Act: Return Home Abort Distance
Fields.Description:
The distance whilst in combat, after which an attempt to return home will be aborted. In metres.
A parameter for the COMMON_SetBattleActLogic script.

Fields.Name: Battle Act: Non-Combat Act Duration
Fields.Description:
The duration for non-combat acts whilst this character is aware of a target. In seconds.
A parameter for the COMMON_SetBattleActLogic script.

Fields.Name: Return Home: Target Look-At Duration
Fields.Description: When this character is returning home, this is the duration they keep looking at their current target for. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Return Home: Target Look-At Distance
Fields.Description: When this character is returning home, this is the distance at which they keep looking at their current target for. In metres.

Fields.Name: Visual Target Forget Duration
Fields.Description: The duration after a visual target has been acquired in which it will be forgotten. In frames.

Fields.Name: Auditory Target Forget Duration
Fields.Description: The duration after a aural target has been acquired in which it will be forgotten. In frames.

Fields.Name: Battle Start Distance
Fields.Description: The distance at which this character will start combat after acquiring a target. In metres.

Fields.Name: Call for Help: Respond Friend Group ID
Fields.Description: The friend group ID this character belongs to, and thus which other characters it will respond to.

Fields.Name: Call for Help: Call Friend Group ID
Fields.Description: The friend group ID this character belongs to, and thus which other characters it can call to.

Fields.Name: Damage Effect Rate
Fields.Description: The damage effect rate for this character, used in the target system evaluation.

Fields.Name: Team Attack Weight
Fields.Description:
A value used to determine the number of simultaneous attackers within a group of characters that share the same team.

Each potential attacker adds thier TeamAttackEffectivity to a total value. If this total value is or exceeds 100, no more attackers will be allowed to attack.

In general, this means higher values reduce the number of potential attackers against a target.

Fields.Name: Visual Search: Horizontal Angle
Fields.Description: The horizontal cone within which the visual search is performed. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Visual Search: Vertical Angle
Fields.Description: The vertical cone within which the visual search is performed. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Auditory Search: Horizontal Angle
Fields.Description: The horizontal cone within which the aural search is performed. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Auditory Search: Vertical Angle
Fields.Description: The vertical cone within which the aural search is performed. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Call for Help: Minimum Distance to Target
Fields.Description: If a character is closer than this distance to their target, they cannot call for friends. In metres.

Fields.Name: Call for Help: Maximum Distance to Friend
Fields.Description: If a character is further than this distance to a friend, they cannot call the friend. In metres.

Fields.Name: Call for Help: Respond Duration
Fields.Description: When a friend is called, this is the duration it takes to answer and then forget the call. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Call for Help: Minimum Delay
Fields.Description: The minimum duration after a call that any friend responses can occur. In milliseconds.

Fields.Name: Call for Help: Maximum Delay
Fields.Description: The maximum duration after a call that any friend responses can occur. In milliseconds.

Fields.Name: Caution State: Goal Action
Fields.Description: The goal action when this character becomes alert.

Fields.Name: Search State: Goal Action
Fields.Description: The goal action when this character acquires a target.

Fields.Name: Call for Help: Post-Response Action Type
Fields.Description: The action type for reaching the friend's position after responding to a call.

Fields.Name: Disable Path Movement
Fields.Description: If ON, then path movement using the navigation mesh is ignored, and direct movement occurs in a straight line (obstacles are not accounted for).

Fields.Name: Skip Arrival Line of Sight Check
Fields.Description: If ON, arrival is achieved even if there is no line of sight.

Fields.Name: Is Entourage
Fields.Description: If ON, this character plays the role of an entourage. This is a think attribute.

Fields.Name: Can Navigate: Cliff
Fields.Description: If ON, this character can navigate on graph edges marked with the 'cliff' navigation flag.

Fields.Name: Can Navigate: Wide
Fields.Description: If ON, this character can navigate on graph edges marked with the 'wide' navigation flag.

Fields.Name: Can Navigate: Ladder
Fields.Description: If ON, this character can navigate on graph edges marked with the 'ladder' navigation flag.

Fields.Name: Can Navigate: Hole
Fields.Description: If ON, this character can navigate on graph edges marked with the 'hole' navigation flag.

Fields.Name: Can Navigate: Door
Fields.Description: If ON, this character can navigate on graph edges marked with the 'door' navigation flag.

Fields.Name: Can Navigate: In the Wall
Fields.Description: If ON, this character can navigate on graph edges marked with the 'in the wall' navigation flag.
